scope: Post-Phase G user-facing scholarship MVP foundation

status_policy.rationale: Mitigated and accepted risks retain a future observation or resolution work unit; only resolved records have completed resolution evidence.

risks.description: cau_003 still requires duplicate-evidence review before it can be exposed.
risks.resolution_evidence: H fixture evidence exercises the existing detail and attachment extractor. The bounded live closure confirmed that cau_003's current generic list candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings without source-specific configuration; duplicate evidence remains review-only.
risks.evidence: H fixture evidence exercises the existing detail and attachment extractor. The bounded live closure confirmed that cau_003's current generic list candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings without source-specific configuration; duplicate evidence remains review-only.
risks.deferral_reason: Mitigation preserves review-only handling, but no persisted reviewer decision lifecycle exists yet.
risks.success_criteria: A reviewer can compare duplicate evidence and record an explicit decision.

risks.description: cau_012 source coverage remains incomplete and is not represented as absence evidence.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: cau_012 is absent from the committed source inventory; bounded crawl evidence cannot establish canonical identity.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded coverage evidence records cau_012 as absent from the committed source inventory and preserves that this is not source-absence evidence.
risks.deferral_reason: cau_012 is absent from the committed source inventory; bounded crawl evidence cannot establish canonical identity.
risks.success_criteria: Bounded source coverage evidence is captured with an explicit result classification.

risks.description: cau_008 has incomplete batch evidence and remains hidden from public exposure.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: The bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent, so attachment candidates cannot be credited as notice attachments. Download and attachment content interpretation remain out of scope.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but did not establish attributable notice attachments because source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent.
risks.deferral_reason: The bounded live closure reached the configured list endpoint but source-specific list-to-notice mapping is absent, so attachment candidates cannot be credited as notice attachments. Download and attachment content interpretation remain out of scope.
risks.next_work_unit: Source-specific list-to-detail mapping, attachment/parser convergence, and bounded source recheck
risks.success_criteria: A source-specific notice mapping and bounded recheck produce attributable attachment metadata, or a documented exception resolves the incomplete-batch state.

risks.description: Attachment extraction and download verification are not complete.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H performs metadata-only evidence and does not download or interpret complex attachment content.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H validation records metadata-only attachment evidence and explicitly excludes attachment download and complex-content interpretation.
risks.deferral_reason: H performs metadata-only evidence and does not download or interpret complex attachment content.
risks.next_work_unit: Attachment/parser convergence with deterministic extraction evidence and bounded source recheck
risks.success_criteria: Complex attachment cases have deterministic extraction evidence and explicit review handling.

risks.description: cau_007 zero-match observation is not proof of source exhaustion or scholarship absence.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: The bounded live closure reached HTTP 200 responses, but the current generic anchor candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings because source-specific mapping configuration is absent.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H bounded live closure reached HTTP 200 responses but records that generic anchor candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings.
risks.deferral_reason: The bounded live closure reached HTTP 200 responses, but the current generic anchor candidates are not verified notice-detail mappings because source-specific mapping configuration is absent.
risks.next_work_unit: Source-specific list-to-detail mapping, readable-body and encoding verification, and bounded source recheck
risks.success_criteria: A bounded source-specific mapping recheck records attributable notice-body evidence without turning zero match into absence.

risks.description: Contextual keyword detection can still miss or overclassify scholarship notices.
risks.resolution_evidence: H classifies bounded candidates as contextual_only or insufficient_evidence and leaves the production detector unchanged.
risks.evidence: H classifies bounded candidates as contextual_only or insufficient_evidence and leaves the production detector unchanged.
risks.deferral_reason: The bounded corpus is a mitigation evidence set, not a completed precision and recall resolution for future sources.
risks.next_work_unit: Bounded contextual keyword detector corpus recheck
risks.success_criteria: A bounded corpus has measured contextual keyword precision and recall review evidence.

risks.description: The available fixture subset is not nationwide scholarship coverage.
risks.resolution_evidence: H records a four-source bounded fixture comparison and a live closure. cau_002 failed closed on local TLS certificate verification, while three generic list mappings remain unverified; the non-completeness limitation is preserved.
risks.evidence: H records a four-source bounded fixture comparison and a live closure. cau_002 failed closed on local TLS certificate verification, while three generic list mappings remain unverified; the non-completeness limitation is preserved.
risks.deferral_reason: The accepted bounded-coverage boundary prevents overclaiming but does not establish nationwide source coverage.
risks.next_work_unit: Bounded source coverage expansion and observation-window recheck
risks.success_criteria: Coverage claims are tied to a published bounded source inventory and observation window.

risks.description: The G verification environment resolved @next/env, sharp, and unrs-resolver bootstrap concerns.
risks.success_criteria: A standard Node and package-manager environment completes the documented build verification.

risks.description: Review decisions are read-only diagnostics and are not persisted.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H remains read-only and does not introduce review persistence.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H validation records read-only operation with no review-state mutation or persistence path.
risks.deferral_reason: H remains read-only and does not introduce review persistence.
risks.success_criteria: An approved schema and auditable review-decision lifecycle are implemented and reviewed.

risks.description: The normalized graph has not been approved or migrated into the production schema.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H does not create or approve schema migrations.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H validation records no migration and preserves the normalized graph as a read-only foundation.
risks.deferral_reason: H does not create or approve schema migrations.
risks.success_criteria: A schema proposal is approved with compatibility, rollback, and migration plans.

risks.description: No production apply path is approved or implemented.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H does not implement a production apply path.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H validation records no production apply path and no DB write.
risks.deferral_reason: H does not implement a production apply path.
risks.success_criteria: A separately approved guarded apply design passes dry-run, audit, and rollback review.

risks.description: The production build observed a warning that public.site_settings was absent from the schema cache.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H does not inspect or migrate the target environment schema.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase G build verification observed the public.site_settings schema-cache warning without inspecting the target environment.
risks.deferral_reason: H does not inspect or migrate the target environment schema.
risks.next_work_unit: Schema alignment and site settings migration planning
risks.success_criteria: Confirm whether site_settings exists in the target environment schema; if needed, prepare a migration and compatibility plan.

risks.description: Deterministic replay validates evidence and policy contracts but not external model quality, prompt robustness, outage behavior, cost, latency, or version drift.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: No provider credential or live call is used in the bounded prototype; automatic decisions and persistence remain prohibited.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase I deterministic replay validates the evidence and policy contract with zero external provider calls and no persistence.
risks.deferral_reason: No provider credential or live call is used in the bounded prototype; automatic decisions and persistence remain prohibited.
risks.next_work_unit: Provider audit, privacy, cost, and production-readiness design
risks.success_criteria: A separately approved provider evaluation records quality, citation correctness, prompt-injection resistance, outage fallback, privacy, latency, and cost evidence without enabling automatic approval.

risks.description: The main-repository ESLint baseline has seven existing errors and five warnings outside the H change set.
risks.why_not_resolved_now: H adds no application UI or existing lint-error file changes; changed H scripts pass direct ESLint.
risks.evidence: Post-Phase H validation records direct ESLint success for changed scripts while preserving the unrelated main-repository baseline.
risks.deferral_reason: H adds no application UI or existing lint-error file changes; changed H scripts pass direct ESLint.
risks.next_work_unit: Main repository lint baseline remediation planning
risks.success_criteria: Main ESLint errors are remediated or explicitly baselined without introducing new errors in later phase changes.
